calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-032d PCC-analog metastability scalar -- substrate validation (deterministic arithmetic + agent integration)
items.notes: Substrate validation for SD-032d PCC-analog (IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-19). SD-032d is non-trainable arithmetic, so primary validation is deterministic API + arithmetic checks. C1 baseline_neutral: stability within 0.01 of baseline=0.5 with all-neutral inputs. C2 fatigue_monotone: stability strictly decreasing across drive_level 0.0/0.5/1.0 (falsification-signature direct test). C3 offline_recency_monotone: stability decreasing as steps_since_offline grows 0/250/500/1000 (saturates at window). C4 offline_reset_hook: note_offline_entry resets counter + restores stability. C5 success_ema_convergence: ema > 0.95 after 200 outcomes at alpha=0.02. C6 threshold_modulation: SalienceCoordinator effective_threshold strictly increasing in pcc_stability across 0.1/0.5/0.9 (MECH-259 wiring confirmed). C7 agent_integration: REEAgent select_action populates _pcc_last_tick AND injects pcc_stability into coordinator before tick. C8 backward_compat: use_pcc_analog=False -> agent.pcc is None and convenience hooks no-op. PASS = all 8 checks. Behavioural falsification of rest-driven mode-switch-rate signature requires combined SD-032a+SD-032c+SD-032d 4-arm 2x2 follow-up once cluster fully landed. experiment_purpose=diagnostic.

items.title: Q-034 hazard/resource threshold retest (supersedes V3-EXQ-288 criteria_null)
items.notes: Retest of V3-EXQ-288 (criteria_null). Tightened design with direct goal_reach/harm_exposure/entropy per grid point. 5x3 grid: hazard_density in {0.05,0.10,0.15,0.20,0.25} x resource_density in {0.04,0.08,0.12} = 15 points x 2 seeds = 30 runs, 30 warmup + 30 eval eps each at 200 steps. Uses SD-018 resource_proximity_head and SD-012 drive_weight=2.0 (post-288 substrate). Acceptance: C1 goal_reach monotonically decreasing in hazard_density within >=2/3 resource-density columns; C2 at least one grid point where goal_reach crosses 0.5; C3 all 15 points complete with non-null metrics (the criteria_null fix); C4 avoidance signature at high-hazard/low-resource (diagnostic). PASS = C1 AND C2 AND C3. experiment_purpose=evidence. supersedes V3-EXQ-288.

items.title: SD-032b dACC full pipeline -- E3 harm_eval + terrain trained, terrain fix: min-residue candidate
items.notes: Full-pipeline fix for EXQ-445 monostrategy collapse (root cause: E3 never trained; untrained E3 always selects same action -> entropy=0). Fix: P0 trains E1, E3 harm_eval, terrain_prior (min-residue candidate, not E3-selected), and world-forward. P1 trains E2_harm_a on frozen encoder. P2 eval with pure policy. Also fixes terrain_prior inversion (from ARC-007 diagnosis): terrain trained on minimum-residue candidate from candidate set, not E3's selected trajectory. 3 seeds x 2 conditions (OFF vs ON_INDEPENDENT) x 280 eps x 120 steps. PASS: C1 harm_a_forward_r2>=0.3 in >=2/3 seeds; C2 |entropy_ON - entropy_OFF|>=0.1 in >=2/3 seeds; C3 ON entropy >= OFF entropy in >=2/3 seeds. experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: MECH-104 volatility interrupt -- surprise-gate matched-seed discriminative pair
items.notes: Matched-seed discriminative pair for MECH-104: SURPRISE_GATE_ON (running_variance spike fires on unexpected harm only) vs SURPRISE_GATE_ABLATED. Tests that unexpected harm events selectively raise commitment uncertainty enabling de-commitment. 2 seeds, 400 warmup + 50 eval, 6 pre-registered criteria. experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: SD-016 cue_action_proj forward-path probe -- instrument extract_cue_context -> E3.select chain (supersedes V3-EXQ-449)
items.notes: Diagnostic forward-path probe for SD-016 cue_action_proj. EXQ-449 confirmed weights train under supervised arm but action_bias_divergence stays at 0.0 -- something downstream zeroes the signal before it reaches E3.select. EXQ-449a instruments the full forward path (extract_cue_context -> ContextMemory attention -> cue_action_proj -> hippocampal.propose_trajectories -> E3.select) under three eval regimes to localise the blocker. Regimes: g1 supervised-active W_std, g2 frozen W_std, g3 frozen W_no_detach (monkeypatched _e1_tick bypasses detach of action_bias, terrain_weight, and z_world input). Single seed 42, P0=25 encoder warmup + P1=50 supervised finetune per variant. Two training variants (W_std, W_no_detach) -> 1 seed x 2 conditions. Instrumentation: action_bias norm / per-channel std, terrain_weight norm, ao_target norm, attention entropy, ContextMemory slot diversity. Acceptance: C1 diagnosis_localised (>=1 offender tensor below threshold in g2), C2 detach_isolated bonus (g3 div > 0.05), C3 context_memory_pre_zero (>=80 percent g2 coverage > 1e-3), C4 supervised_target_sanity (>=80 percent P1 coverage > 1e-3). primary_pass = C1 AND C3 AND C4 (localises blocker). experiment_purpose=diagnostic (excluded from governance scoring). Unblocks EXQ-418b successor once specific forward-path offender identified.

items.title: MECH-266 asymmetric per-mode hysteresis landing -- competing goals (EXP-0160 / ocd4)
items.notes: MECH-266 asymmetric per-mode hysteresis landing diagnostic (ocd4 row 'competing goals', EXP-0160). Five sub-tests (all arithmetic + API) exercising the new per-mode enter_thresholds / exit_thresholds rails on SD-032a SalienceCoordinator: UC1 backward compat (empty dicts -> enter_threshold==switch_threshold, exit_threshold==1.0 sentinel, legacy MECH-259 trigger pattern); UC2 ARM A symmetric baseline (exit=1.0 all modes -> reproduces legacy switch count on fixed synthetic competing-goals signal sequence); UC3 ARM B moderate Schmitt (exit=0.3 all modes -> strictly fewer switches than baseline -- Schmitt blocks marginal R2->R3 flip where planning-prob ~0.33); UC4 ARM C severe over-binding (exit=0.05 all modes -> stuck-in-external_task, n_switches <= 1, fraction_in_external_task >= 0.8 -- OCD axis stuck signature); UC5 per-mode asymmetry (exit keyed per mode -> condition-X sticky-external-task, condition-Y leaves external readily and sticks in internal_planning; confirms per-mode keying of the Schmitt rail). PASS = all 5. Anchor plan: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/sd033_governance_plan.md. Source: docs/thoughts/2026-04-20_ocd4.md row 'competing goals'. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Full behavioural test (switch-cost asymmetry on env-driven dual-cue tasks, unresolved goal-oscillation episode rate) deferred to EXQ-464b -- requires CausalGridWorldV2 dual simultaneously active resource-cue extension not yet on any roadmap item.

items.title: MECH-266 asymmetric per-mode hysteresis landing -- mode stickiness / hold decay (EXP-0163 / ocd4)
items.notes: MECH-266 parametric dose-response landing diagnostic (ocd4 row 'mode stickiness / hold decay', EXP-0163). Five-arm parametric sweep of the MECH-266 exit/enter ratio on SD-032a SalienceCoordinator: A1 r=0.10 over-binding severe (OCD axis), A2 r=0.50 over-binding moderate, A3 r=1.00 symmetric baseline (legacy MECH-259 match), A4 r=1.50 under-binding mild, A5 r=2.00 under-binding severe (aggressive-switching / depression axis). Ratio encoding: r<=1 tightens exit; r>1 lowers enter=1/r while leaving exit at legacy no-op. Five sub-tests on a fixed synthetic three-regime competing-goals signal sequence with an intra-R2 doubt tick: UC1 n_switches monotone non-decreasing A1..A5; UC2 longest_run_in_mode monotone non-increasing A1..A5; UC3 A1 stuck signature (n_switches<=1 AND max_mode_share>=0.8); UC4 A3 matches legacy empty-dicts trigger count; UC5 U-shape around ideal -- |n_switches - ideal| minimised at A3, strictly larger at BOTH A1 and A5. PASS = all 5. Anchor plan: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/sd033_governance_plan.md. Source: docs/thoughts/2026-04-20_ocd4.md row 'mode stickiness / hold decay'. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Behavioural dose-response (goal-completion curve, residue-accumulation curve, behavioural monostrategy index, mean-time-in-mode per operating mode) deferred to EXQ-467b -- requires CausalGridWorldV2 scheduled-distractor extension not yet on any roadmap item.

items.title: MECH-267 mode-conditioned hippocampal proposal landing -- rule binding (EXP-0158 / ocd4)
items.notes: MECH-267 mode-conditioned hippocampal-proposal landing diagnostic (ocd4 'rule binding' row, EXP-0158). Five sub-tests (deterministic arithmetic + module API): UC1 signature accepts operating_mode (HippocampalModule.propose_trajectories and forward accept operating_mode kwarg with probability-vector dict); UC2 disabled-by-default backward compat (mode_conditioning_enabled=False -> noise scale None, ao_std unchanged); UC3 mode contrast (internal_planning noise scale 1.3 vs external_task 1.0, ratio >= 1.25); UC4 soft mix convex combination (0.5:0.5 external_task:internal_planning -> 1.15 within 1e-6); UC5 ARM-A vs ARM-C structural contrast (SD-033a ON + MECH-267 ON yields per-mode differentiated ao_std AND rule_state persistence across transitions via MECH-261 external_task gate=1.0; MECH-267 OFF eliminates differentiation). PASS = all 5. Anchor plan: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/sd033_governance_plan.md. Source: docs/thoughts/2026-04-20_ocd4.md row 'rule binding'. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Behavioural EXP-0158 runs deferred: require cue_action_proj installation path currently blocked on EXQ-449a forward-path probe.

items.title: MECH-267 x MECH-094 intrusive-simulation filtering landing (EXP-0161 / ocd4)
items.notes: MECH-267 x MECH-094 intrusive-simulation filtering landing diagnostic (ocd4 'intrusive simulation filtering' row, EXP-0161). Five sub-tests (deterministic module API + residue-write semantics): UC1 signature accepts operating_mode under replay semantics (internal_replay pin); UC2 disabled-by-default backward compat (mode_conditioning_enabled=False -> no ao_std modulation under replay); UC3 internal_replay < external_task noise scale (replay 0.5 vs task 1.0, ratio <= 0.6 consistent with tightened rehearsal distribution); UC4 MECH-094 residue-write gate under simulated intrusion (hypothesis_tag=True blocks RBF weight delta; hypothesis_tag=False produces positive delta -- asymmetric first-line filter); UC5 ARM structural contrast (ARM A MECH-094 ON + MECH-267 ON composes both filters; ARM B MECH-094 OFF allows residue contamination despite mode-appropriate proposal; ARM C MECH-267 OFF protects residue but mode-insensitive proposal). PASS = all 5. Anchor plan: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/sd033_governance_plan.md. Source: docs/thoughts/2026-04-20_ocd4.md row 'intrusive simulation filtering'. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Behavioural 3-arm EXP-0161 test deferred -- requires forced-replay injection hook into E3/hippocampal tick not yet on any roadmap item.
